title: ONE 2 ANOTHER SUPPORT SERVICES - 211info
text: ONE2ANOTHER ONE 2 ANOTHER SUPPORT SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers support services to bridge communication between families and professionals. Services may include attending meetings at work or school with individuals and families and/or attending court appearances to take notes and provide emotional support. Does not provide legal advice or aid. Other services include parenting classes, anger management classes, and children's activities. 1113 Hill Street Suite K Albany, OR 97322 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Varies based on services Email (541) 570-0284 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 570-0284 Text message (541) 570-7415 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Benton and Linn Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Wednesday 9am-4pm, Friday 9am-1pm Services: Anger Management Case/Care Management Parenting Skills Classes Youth Enrichment Programs If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
